title: Number of Connected Components in an Undirected Graph
input_format: An integer `n` and an array `edges` where `edges[i] = [ai, bi]` indicates that there is an edge between `ai` and `bi` in the graph.
output_format: The number of connected components in the graph.
constraints:
- `1 <= n <= 2000`
- `1 <= edges.length <= 5000`
- `edges[i].length == 2`
- `0 <= ai <= bi < n`
- `ai != bi`
- There are no repeated edges.
function_signature: function countComponents(n: number, edges: number[][]): number {}
